headline: Is Workday’s (WDAY) Expanding Partner Integrations Quietly Reinforcing Its Core System-of-Record Advantage?
summary: In April 2026, EZE Cloud Consulting, Exclaimer, and Achievers each announced new ways they are embedding Workday’s AI-powered HCM platform deeper into their operations and products, spanning rapid multi-country deployments, HR-driven email signature automation, and integrated employee recognition and rewards. Taken together, these moves highlight how partners are increasingly treating Workday as a core system of record and workflow engine, extending its influence across HR, finance,...
